headline: Mizuho Raises PT on Equinix, Inc. (EQIX)
summary: ​Equinix, Inc. (NASDAQ:EQIX) is one of the Best Data Center REITs to Buy According to Analysts.. Recently, on May 7, Mizuho analyst Vikram Malhotra raised the firm’s price target on Equinix, Inc. (NASDAQ:EQIX) from $1,165 to $1,200 and maintained a Buy rating on the shares. ​The rating comes after the company released its fiscal Q1 […]

headline: Equinix to invest $190m in fourth Malaysia data centre
summary: The site, designated KL2, will be built in Cyberjaya within one kilometre of the company's existing KL1 facility in the greater Kuala Lumpur area.

raw.headline: Equinix to invest $190m in fourth Malaysia data centre

headline: Elizabeth Warren Targets Amazon, Google, Microsoft And Meta After Warning That AI Data Centers 'Use As Much Electricity As 100,000 Households'
summary: Warren is investigating whether AI data centers are raising U.S. electricity costs by pushing infrastructure expenses onto consumers.
